message:
🌱 Add kubevirt: virtctl command not working on Arm Mac mission (#917)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kubevirt-7305-virtctl-command-not-working-on-arm-mac",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kubevirt: virtctl command not working on Arm Mac",
+    "description": "virtctl command not working on Arm Mac. This issue affects 8+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify kubevirt troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your kubevirt deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt -n kubevirt --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kubevirt configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kubevirt configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt\nkubectl get configmap -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubevirt\n```\n**What happened**:\n\nI followed [the documentation to install virtctl](https://kubevirt.io/quickstart_cloud/)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for virtctl command not working on Arm Mac",
+        "description": "This PR adds the necessary code to build and release `virtctl` for the `darwin-arm64` architecture for Macs with Apple Silicon. After running `make bazel-build` a new binary `virtctl-4d1925c86-darwin-arm64` is created that can be executed on a Mac with an Apple Silicon processor.\n\n*(optional, in\n```yaml\nVERSION=$(kubectl get kubevirt.kubevirt.io/kubevirt -n kubevirt -o=jsonpath=\"{.status.observedKubeVirtVersion}\")\nARCH=$(uname -s | tr A-Z a-z)-$(uname -m | sed 's/x86_64/amd64/') || windows-amd64.exe\necho ${ARCH}\ncurl -L -o virtctl https://github.com/kubevirt/kubevirt/releases/download/${VERSION}/virtctl-${VERSION}-${ARCH}\nchmod +x virtctl\nsudo install virtctl /usr/local/bin\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm virtctl command not working on Arm Mac is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt -n kubevirt --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n kubevirt --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR adds the necessary code to build and release `virtctl` for the `darwin-arm64` architecture for Macs with Apple Silicon. After running `make bazel-build` a new binary `virtctl-4d1925c86-darwin-arm64` is created that can be executed on a Mac with an Apple Silicon processor.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "VERSION=$(kubectl get kubevirt.kubevirt.io/kubevirt -n kubevirt -o=jsonpath=\"{.status.observedKubeVirtVersion}\")\nARCH=$(uname -s | tr A-Z a-z)-$(uname -m | sed 's/x86_64/amd64/') || windows-amd64.exe\necho ${ARCH}\ncurl -L -o virtctl https://github.com/kubevirt/kubevirt/releases/download/${VERSION}/virtctl-${VERSION}-${ARCH}\nchmod +x virtctl\nsudo install virtctl /usr/local/bin",
+        "VERSION=$(kubectl get kubevirt.kubevirt.io/kubevirt -n kubevirt -o=jsonpath=\"{.status.observedKubeVirtVersion}\")\n# Force AMD64 build and use the emulation\nARCH=darwin-amd64\ncurl -L -o virtctl https://github.com/kubevirt/kubevirt/releases/download/${VERSION}/virtctl-${VERSION}-${ARCH}\nchmod +x virtctl\nsudo install virtctl /usr/local/bin"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "kubevirt",
+      "incubating",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "kubevirt"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "VirtualMachineInstance"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/kubevirt/kubevirt/issues/7305",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/kubevirt/kubevirt",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/kubevirt/kubevirt/pull/9842"
+    },
+    "reactions": 8,
+    "comments": 11,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "virtctl",
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with kubevirt installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
